privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic Android project named LogisticsDashboard at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/LogisticsDashboard with package com.example.logisticsdashboard. The task requires agents to implement a custom View component. The expected file paths relative to the project root are: attrs.xml at app/src/main/res/values/attrs.xml (to be created by agent), StatusDotView.kt at app/src/main/java/com/example/logisticsdashboard/views/StatusDotView.kt (to be created by agent), and activity_main.xml at app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml (pre-created template). All metadata path claims are verified by the setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts.
